title: One quadrillion is the number used to describe the wealth effect of South Korea’s stock-market miracle
summary: South Korea's stock market has more than doubled this year, creating significant wealth effects across the population. The optimistic scenario estimates a wealth effect of KRW 43 trillion ($28 billion), demonstrating the economic impact of the market surge.
content: Having more than doubled already this year, Korea’s stock market returns have driven a wealth effect that under an optimistic scenario could generate a wealth effect among the populace of KRW 43 trillion ($28 billion)

zh.title: 四万亿韩元：韩国股市奇迹产生的财富效应
zh.summary: 韩国股市今年增长超过一倍，在全社会产生了显著的财富效应。乐观情景估计财富效应达43万亿韩元（280亿美元），展现了股市增长的经济影响。

title: We need to have ability to slow AI down, says Anthropic co-founder
summary: Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark warns that AI could eventually develop autonomously without human input, emphasizing the need for mechanisms to control AI development pace. The statement highlights growing concerns about maintaining human oversight as AI systems become more powerful.
content: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.

zh.title: Anthropic联合创始人称需要有能力放缓人工智能发展
zh.summary: Anthropic联合创始人杰克·克拉克警告称，人工智能最终可能在无需人类输入的情况下自主发展，强调了控制人工智能发展步伐的必要性。该声明凸显了随着人工智能系统日益强大，维持人类监督的日益增长的重要性。

title: China poaches more AI talent from the U.S. as it eyes the next 'super-app'
summary: China is increasingly recruiting AI talent from the United States, with Tencent's Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu—formerly of OpenAI—now pursuing artificial general intelligence development. This trend reflects China's strategic push to build competitive AI capabilities domestically.
content: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.

zh.title: 中国在争夺"超级应用"之际从美国挖角更多AI人才
zh.summary: 中国正在大量从美国招募人工智能人才，腾讯首席人工智能科学家、前OpenAI科学家姚舜宇正在参与人工通用智能开发。这一趋势反映了中国建立国内竞争力人工智能能力的战略举措。

title: India's cenbank cuts growth outlook, raises inflation forecast as it keeps rates steady at 5.25%
summary: India's Reserve Bank cut its growth forecast to 6.6% while raising its inflation projection to 5.1%, maintaining interest rates at 5.25%. The adjustments reflect economic headwinds as the RBI balances inflation concerns with growth targets.
content: RBI raised its inflation projection for the year ending March 2027 by 50 basis points to 5.1%, while cutting growth forecast to 6.6% for the year, from 6.9%.

zh.title: 印度央行下调增长前景，上调通胀预期，维持利率在5.25%
zh.summary: 印度央行将增长预期下调至6.6%，同时将通胀预期上调至5.1%，维持利率在5.25%不变。这些调整反映了经济逆风，印度央行在平衡通胀担忧与增长目标之间取得平衡。

title: Grant puts gloss on paint recycling enterprise
summary: A Cambridgeshire-based paint recycling social enterprise has received a £400,000 grant from the National Lottery to support its expansion. The funding enables the business to scale its sustainable recycling operations.
content: A Cambridgeshire social enterprise is awarded £400,000 by the National Lottery to help it expand.

zh.title: 补助金为油漆回收企业增添光彩
zh.summary: 一家位于剑桥郡的油漆回收社会企业获得了国家彩票基金会40万英镑的补助，以支持其扩展。该资金使该企业能够扩大其可持续回收业务。

title: China cracks down on soft porn, violence and materialism in viral micro dramas
summary: China is cracking down on micro dramas that contain adult content, violence, and materialistic themes as the format surges in popularity. The regulatory action aims to address concerns about increasingly sensationalist content in the viral short-form video space.
content: Micro dramas have surged in popularity, but drawn criticism for often sensationalist content.

zh.title: 中国严厉打击病毒式微剧中的软色情、暴力和物质主义内容
zh.summary: 随着微剧格式的流行程度激增，中国正在严厉打击包含成人内容、暴力和物质主义主题的微剧。这一监管行动旨在解决病毒式短视频领域中越来越多耸人听闻内容的问题。

title: Chippies turn to new species amid 'massive' cod price rise
summary: UK fish and chip shops are switching to alternative fish species as cod prices surge dramatically, with experts describing the fish as "white gold" due to scarcity. The price increases are forcing businesses to adapt their traditional menus.
content: Experts say cod has turned into "white gold" as the prices keeps going up.

zh.title: 英国炸鱼薯条店应对鳕鱼价格飙升转向新鱼种
zh.summary: 随着鳕鱼价格大幅上涨，英国炸鱼薯条店正在转向替代鱼种。专家们因鳕鱼稀缺而将其称为"白色黄金"。价格上升迫使这些企业调整传统菜单。

title: Tracking website, food watch: South Korea is obsessing over Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's visit
summary: South Korean investors are closely monitoring Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's activities during his visit, anticipating major announcements about the AI company's future plans. The heightened attention reflects South Korea's strategic interest in Nvidia's next moves in the AI market.
content: South Korean investors are eagerly tracking Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's every move as they wait to see what the AI megacap company will do next.

zh.title: 追踪网站、美食监测热潮：韩国沉迷于英伟达CEO黄仁勋的访问
zh.summary: 韩国投资者正在密切监控英伟达CEO黄仁勋访问期间的活动，期待该AI公司发布关于未来计划的重大公告。这种高度关注反映了韩国对英伟达在AI市场中下一步举措的战略兴趣。

title: British Heart Foundation plans to close 150 charity shops
summary: The British Heart Foundation announced plans to close 150 charity shops due to an exceptionally challenging retail environment. The closures reflect broader pressures facing UK charities navigating difficult economic conditions.
content: The charity says it is facing "an exceptionally challenging trading environment".

zh.title: 英国心脏基金会计划关闭150家慈善商店
zh.summary: 由于零售环境异常严峻，英国心脏基金会宣布计划关闭150家慈善商店。这些关闭反映了英国慈善机构在应对困难经济条件中面临的更广泛压力。

title: In ‘wild’ twist, SpaceX won’t be allowed early entry to the S&P 500 after all
summary: Despite consideration of policy changes, S&P Dow Jones Indices decided to maintain unchanged requirements, preventing SpaceX from obtaining early entry into the S&P 500 index. The decision preserves current index inclusion standards despite anticipated pressure.
content: S&P Dow Jones Indices considered whether to loosen index requirements but opted to keep its policies unchanged.

zh.title: 在"意外转折"中，SpaceX最终不被允许提前进入标普500指数
zh.summary: 尽管考虑了政策变更，标普道琼斯指数公司决定维持不变的要求，防止SpaceX获得提前进入标普500指数的资格。该决定在预期压力下保持了当前的指数纳入标准。

title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren is calling for a Senate hearing with Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to address concerns about export controls, China sales, and AI chip policy as Congress scrutinizes the sector.
content: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.

zh.title: 沃伦邀请英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋出席关于中国AI芯片销售的参议院听证会
zh.summary: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦呼吁召开参议院听证会，邀请英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋讨论出口管制、中国销售和AI芯片政策问题，因为国会正在对该行业进行审查。

title: SpaceX blocked from early U.S. benchmark index entry as S&P reaffirms existing rules
summary: S&P Global declined to change its index entry requirements, preventing SpaceX from early inclusion in major indices ahead of Elon Musk's planned IPO.
content: S&P Global said Thursday it was not changing the requirements for entry into its major indices, dealing a setback to the IPO plans of Elon Musk's SpaceX.

zh.title: 标普重申现有规则，SpaceX被阻止提前进入美国基准指数
zh.summary: 标普全球拒绝改变其指数纳入要求，导致SpaceX在埃隆·马斯克计划的首次公开募股前无法提前纳入主要指数。

title: South Korea stocks fall 4% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names
summary: South Korean markets declined 4% as major tech stocks fell in line with a Wall Street rotation away from AI-related chip investments.
content: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.

zh.title: 韩国股市跌4%，科技巨头跟随华尔街AI相关股票暴跌
zh.summary: 韩国市场下跌4%，主要科技股票跟随华尔街从AI相关芯片投资的轮换而下跌。

title: Trump announces $700m coal investment using wartime powers
summary: President Trump is directing $700 million toward coal investment using emergency wartime powers as the Iran conflict drives up energy costs.
content: The president is directing money into coal as the Iran war drives up energy costs for Americans.

zh.title: 特朗普利用战时权力宣布投资7亿美元煤炭
zh.summary: 特朗普总统正在利用紧急战时权力向煤炭投资拨款7亿美元，因为伊朗冲突导致能源成本上升。
